videos.transcript: Pesquisar transcrição [music] I know most of you don't remember me, but I know all of you. Even though I [music] was stuck light years away on Earth, I never stopped trying to [music] get back home. Everything changed since you left. It's all gone. Skeletor took my family. and he destroyed our world. [music] It's all my fault. I know how it feels to fail. [music] Take the sword. And when you fall, [music] that's your chance to stand tall. [music] I am. [music] My universe shall quake in my shadow. This is my [music] home. I'm going to fight here. But I can't do it without you. Somebody wants to brawl. I need every man, woman, or whatever that is. [music] [music] You may have the power. But you're too scared to use it. Trust me, I know how to use it. [music] You tell everyone that you're from another planet, it just makes you sound a little very crazy.
